behavior_summary: This script implements the behavior of the MINIAIR item: when used it advances an internal animation/tick helper and then performs a movement/positioning update. The item has a timed frame counter (U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9) and a param-driven movement pattern (U8P_MINIAIR::func0129) that repositions the item relative to its current coordinates when the global levitateAvatar flag is set.

U8P_MINIAIR::use (process) sequences the two helpers: it initializes a small local counter, calls the animation/tick helper (U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9), conditionally increments its counter, then calls the movement routine (U8P_MINIAIR::func0129) passing the counter/index. The U8P_MINIAIR::look process forwards to the animation helper.

U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9 maintains and clamps a per-call frame/index, yields (suspend) for timing, and — when not levitating — calls Item::setFrame(this frame) to update the displayed frame. When levitating it clamps/limits the counter to a smaller range and avoids setFrame in that path.

U8P_MINIAIR::func0129 computes an index from its parameter (param1 * 6), sets a step/timing flag, yields (suspend), and if levitateAvatar is true increments the index/spacing, maps the index into X/Y multipliers, clamps spacing, and issues Item::move to reposition the item using Item::getZ/getY/getX plus computed offsets.
notable_control_flow: Sequential: U8P_MINIAIR::use -> U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9 -> conditional increment -> U8P_MINIAIR::func0129. Both helper functions contain suspend/yield nodes creating multi-tick behavior.
Branching on a global state (levitateAvatar) alters both animation clamping and whether movement computations run.
Index/spacing wrap and clamps exist in U8P_MINIAIR::func0129 to keep offsets and frame indices within bounded ranges across ticks.
open_questions: Exact numeric mapping from index/local multipliers to pixel/world offsets: tables are inferred but not precisely recovered from the disassembly.

Whether param1 passed into U8P_MINIAIR::func0129 originates from other systems besides U8P_MINIAIR::use() in other runtime scenarios (only U8P_MINIAIR::use() and U8P_MINIAIR::look call patterns observed).
Precise meaning of U8P_MINIAIR::use()'s local2 counter beyond being an index/step: its lifecycle and persistence across multiple U8P_MINIAIR::use() invocations is not fully known from the snippet.

main_function.name: U8P_MINIAIR::use
main_function.purpose: Handle activation/U8P_MINIAIR::use of the MINIAIR item: initialize a small local counter, run the animation/tick helper (U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9) and then execute the movement/positioning routine (U8P_MINIAIR::func0129) to update visual frame/position over ticks.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses/activates the MINIAIR item (process type 0x0207).
Acts as the item's U8P_MINIAIR::use/activation entry point that sequences animation and movement helpers.

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::use
function_map.role: entry process for item activation; sequences animation and movement helpers

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::look
function_map.role: inspection handler that invokes the animation/tick helper (delegates to U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9)

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9
function_map.role: animation/frame-tick helper: maintain and clamp a frame counter, yield for timing, and update the item frame in non-levitation path

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::func0129
function_map.role: movement/positioning routine: compute index/spacing from parameter, yield for timing, and when levitating compute offsets and call Item::move

internal_calls.purpose: Advance/manage the item's animation/frame tick before movement.
Compute and apply position offsets (movement) after advancing animation; param-driven positioning.
Run the animation/frame-tick helper when the item is inspected.

external_calls.purpose: Set the item's displayed animation frame using the local frame counter (non-levitating path).
Read current Z coordinate as basis for movement (used with -8 offset).
Read current Y coordinate to add computed Y offset.
Read current X coordinate to add computed X offset.
Reposition the item in world coordinates using computed Z/Y/X arguments (applies offsets relative to current coordinates).

reads.name: levitateAvatar
reads.likely_effect: Selects alternate behavior: when true the script advances a smaller/clamped animation index and enables movement/offset calculations; when false the script uses a different clamping and calls Item::setFrame.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the behavior of the MINIAIR item: when used it advances an internal animation/tick helper and then performs a movement/positioning update. The item has a timed frame counter (U8P_MINIAIR::func00E9) and a param-driven movement pattern (U8P_MINIAIR::func0129) that repositions the item relative to its current coordinates when the global levitateAvatar flag is set.
